overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Death Stranding) showing a character with a large backpack traversing a rugged mountainous landscape. The character walks and runs along narrow dirt paths through rocky terrain with sparse vegetation under bright daylight, eventually reaching a high vantage point overlooking a vast valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with scattered boulders and grass

events.description: character transitions from walking to running up the incline

agents.ego_description: character with large backpack walking then running uphill through rocky grassland, navigating around boulders

entered.detail: large gray rock formation rising steeply ahead
tall yellow-green grass growing between rocks
scattered large rocks and stone debris
jagged rocky summit visible in the distance
narrow winding path through the terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a heavily laden character through a rugged mountain landscape. The character moves steadily uphill through patches of tall grass and scattered boulders, transitioning from a walk to a run as the path ascends. Large rocky cliff faces dominate the background while the trail winds through the uneven terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge path with steep drop-off

events.description: path narrows and follows a cliff edge with steep drop visible to the left
increased exposure to sunlight as character moves away from cliff shadow

agents.ego_description: character carefully walking along a narrow cliffside path with a steep drop to the left, maintaining balance with the heavy load

entered.detail: narrow trail along the edge of a steep precipice
layered mountain peaks visible across the valley
deep gorge with mist visible below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow cliffside path with a dangerous drop to the left revealing a vast valley view. The terrain shifts from grassy boulder fields to exposed rock faces as the path winds along the mountain's edge. Distant mountain ranges become visible across the gorge while the character maintains careful footing on the narrow trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with scattered formations

events.description: character slows from running back to walking pace

agents.ego_description: character moving steadily through a rocky mountain pass, navigating between large boulders and rock spires

entered.detail: massive rounded rock formation beside the path
cluster of weathered stone outcrops
distinctive pointed rock pinnacle
saddle point between two peaks

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider mountain pass dotted with distinctive rock formations and tall spires. The character moves through a landscape of scattered boulders and weathered stone outcrops, with the trail winding toward a distant saddle point between peaks. The cliff edge gives way to a more enclosed rocky terrain surrounded by towering formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky corridor between cliff walls

events.description: entering a narrow passage between high rock walls
lighting becomes more diffused as path enters shadow of cliff walls

agents.ego_description: character walking uphill through a narrow rocky gorge, flanked by steep cliff walls on both sides

entered.detail: constricted trail between towering rock faces
steep vertical rock surfaces flanking the path
sheer stone face rising beside the trail
dramatic rock wall with visible strata

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows significantly into a rocky corridor with steep cliff walls rising on both sides. The character ascends through this confined passage where the lighting becomes more diffused in the shadows of the rock faces. The environment shifts from open boulder fields to an enclosed gorge with sheer stone walls flanking the winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit with panoramic valley overlook

events.description: emerging from narrow pass onto open summit with expansive view
character slows to a stop at the overlook to view the valley below

agents.ego_description: character reaching the summit and pausing to look out over the vast valley and winding path below

entered.detail: rocky peak with panoramic views
wide deep valley with mist and distant terrain
trail visible descending into the valley below
dramatic drop into the gorge with visible terrain layers

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow rocky pass onto a mountain summit with breathtaking panoramic views. The landscape opens dramatically to reveal a vast valley with steep slopes and a winding trail visible far below. The character pauses at this high vantage point, overlooking the expansive terrain and the path that continues down into the misty gorge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rugged mountain ascent that transforms from a wide, grassy climb into a confined rocky corridor before opening onto a panoramic summit. It begins by following a heavily laden character moving uphill through patches of tall grass and scattered boulders, with the camera tracking the transition from a walk to a run. As the path winds along the mountain's edge, the terrain shifts to exposed rock faces and narrow cliffside trails that reveal a vast valley and distant mountain ranges. The scene then moves through a wider pass dotted with stone spires before narrowing significantly into a shadowed rocky corridor with steep walls flanking the dirt path. Finally, the character emerges from the enclosed gorge onto a high vantage point, where the landscape opens dramatically to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the expansive valley and misty slopes below.
